title: Postcept Receipt
description: A signed, tamper-evident proof that a high-risk AI-agent action was checked against the system of record.

org_id.description: The organization the receipt belongs to (signed from v2).

operation_id.description: Stable id for the agent operation.

action.description: The kind of action that was verified.

connectors_checked.description: The systems of record actually consulted (e.g. ["stripe"]), by connector identity. A relay-backed verification names the relay, e.g. ["relay:rly_..."].

valid_as_of.description: The point in time the verification reflects (continuous reconciliation).

test.description: True for sandbox verifications. Signed, so a test receipt cannot be presented as live.

algorithm.description: Signature scheme. Bound into the signed body from v3.

version.description: Signing-body version. Absent is treated as "1". v3 binds the signature metadata, the outcome contract, the lifecycle decision and the observation role into the signed body.

signing_key_id.description: Key fingerprint, e.g. ed25519:... Bound into the signed body from v3.

signature.description: Base64 Ed25519 signature over the canonical signing body for this version. This is the evaluation role, signed by Postcept.

supersedes.description: The receipt this one replaces after re-verification found the truth changed. Signed from v3. Earlier receipts are never mutated.

superseded_by.description: Set when serving a receipt that a later one replaced. Not part of any signing body.

contract_digest.description: sha256 digest of the versioned Outcome Contract this verification was judged by. Signed from v3.

lifecycle.description: Where the action sits in the provider's lifecycle, separate from the outcome. Signed from v3.

safe_to_claim_complete.description: The one boolean an agent may act on. True only when the outcome is verified, the provider state is terminal, and every required postcondition actually ran. Signed from v3.

correlation_strength.description: How the claim was located in the system of record. Signed from v3.

observation_relay_id.description: Observation role. The customer-side relay that read the system of record. Present only on relay-backed receipts.

observation_key_id.description: Observation role. The relay key that signed the observation envelope.

observation_digest.description: Observation role. sha256 over the relay's canonical observation envelope, so the envelope can be checked against this receipt.

observation_signature.description: Observation role. The relay's own Ed25519 signature over the observation envelope. Verified with verifyObservation(receipt, envelope, relayKey). Together with the evaluation signature this is the dual-signature guarantee: the relay observed the source, Postcept evaluated it, and neither can forge the other's statement.

detail.description: Human-readable explanation. Carried on the receipt, not part of the signing body.
